file_insights.changes: Replaced stub cmd_pause with full async implementation
key_additions: cmd_pause now async, collects running cards from flat and team-prefixed directories
pause_single_card helper: reads PID, sends SIGTERM, waits 5s, escalates to SIGKILL if needed
Updates meta.paused_at timestamp and resets Running stages to Pending
Performs atomic rename from running/ to pending/, preserving team directory structure

file_insights.changes: Updated Command::Pause handler to await async function

patterns_discovered.description: Collects cards from both root/running and root/team-*/running, handles both flat and team-based card layouts
SIGTERM → 5s polling (50x 100ms) → SIGKILL if unresponsive → brief delay for effect
Checks card existence before and after metadata update, before rename; handles dispatcher concurrent moves
Sets paused_at timestamp, converts Running stages to Pending, clears agent/provider/duration/started/blocked_by fields
Atomic fs::rename from running/ to pending/, preserving parent directory structure for team cards

gotchas_discovered.issue: Race condition: dispatcher may move card after pause starts
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Two existence checks (after PID termination and before rename); bails with context if card already moved

gotchas_discovered.issue: Process may ignore SIGTERM and require SIGKILL
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Polling loop (50 attempts, 100ms each) before escalation; SIGKILL given 200ms to take effect

gotchas_discovered.issue: Team-based card directory structure must be preserved during state transition
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Extracts parent of running/ directory to determine target pending/ location

gotchas_discovered.issue: Cards may lack PID file (adapter process already exited)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Graceful handling: logs message indicating 'no PID found', continues to pause metadata/state
Filter checks both extensions via matches!(ext, Some("bop") | Some("jobcard"))

approach_outcome.completion: Full implementation of cmd_pause with comprehensive error handling, race condition checks, and state management
approach_outcome.scope: Single feature addition across 2 files (main.rs integration + cards.rs core logic)

recommendations.suggestion: Make SIGTERM wait timeout (5s) and polling interval (100ms) configurable via constants or config
Consider extracting process termination logic (SIGTERM → wait → SIGKILL) into reusable utility module, used by both cmd_pause and cmd_kill
Add inline documentation explaining race condition handling strategy and dispatcher interaction assumptions
For large numbers of running cards, consider parallel termination (tokio::spawn) with bounded concurrency to avoid system load spikes
Consider structured logging (warn/info levels) for pause operations to facilitate debugging of state transitions
